description: Retired in Annapolis, learning watercolor. I follow painting livestreams, ask the odd beginner question in chat, and save clips to practice later.
Live watercolor tutorials for beginners. Loose washes, wet-on-wet, and a lot of patience. New session most weekday mornings.
Daily plein-air and studio watercolor. Landscapes, harbors, and the occasional botanical study. Chat is welcome to ask about brushes and paper.
Watercolor and gouache from the Chesapeake Bay shoreline. Boats, marsh light, and skies. Live paint-alongs on the weekend.
Relaxed watercolor sessions, no pressure. We work slow, talk through color mixing, and answer questions as we go.
Botanical watercolor illustration, live. Leaves, petals, and layered glazing. Beginner-friendly and calm.
24/7 mellow jazz and standards. Something to paint or read to. Requests taken in chat.
Live nature camera over a tidal marsh. Herons, ospreys, and egrets throughout the day. Species called out in chat.
Skies, water, and simple landscapes in watercolor. I explain each wash slowly so beginners can follow along.
Pen-and-watercolor urban sketching from cafes and streets. Quick loose studies with a lot of chatter about pens and paper.
Early watercolor landscape sessions with coffee. Mountains, fields, and quiet mornings. Come paint along.
Gouache and watercolor florals painted from the garden. Slow color mixing and lots of encouragement for beginners.
